brand.name: Leadership Books
brand.vertical: Education/membership (curated book retail + Better Book Club) + B2B professional services (hybrid author publishing)

summary: Leadership Books is a dual-sided company built on Shopify: a curated retailer of leadership, business, finance, and Christian titles with a quarterly Better Book Club subscription, and a hybrid author publishing house offering editorial, design, distribution, marketing, speakers-bureau representation, and a book launch mastermind. It serves two audiences on one platform: avid leader-readers who want high-signal, peer-curated reading, and aspiring author/thought-leaders who want professional publishing while keeping 100% of their rights.

campaigns.name: Welcome & Onboarding
campaigns.objective: Get a new contact to first value fast — for readers, the first curated pick + Book Club; for new subscribers, joining the members LinkedIn group; for buyers, a confident first order with FIRST10.
campaigns.trigger: Email signup / first order placed / Better Book Club subscription started. Send the hero email within seconds of signup.
campaigns.segment: All new contacts; branch on entry point (signup-only, first-time book buyer, new Book Club member) and surveyed interest (reader vs. aspiring author).
campaigns.rationale: The intake shows no visible onboarding for new Book Club members or first-time buyers, and one-off buyers fall into a black hole. Welcome emails are the highest-engagement send and set the reader-to-Club and reader-to-author paths the whole program depends on.

emails.purpose: Warm welcome, set expectations, and deliver one quick win — the next book worth their time plus a low-friction first order.
emails.subject: Welcome to Leadership Books — your next great read is inside
emails.preview: The one book top leaders are reading right now (and $10 off to start).
emails.cta: Claim $10 off your first order with FIRST10
keyPoints: Open on the brand promise — 'Become More' — and that top executives read ~60 books a year; we cut the noise so you read the right ones
Give an immediate win: one hand-picked, high-signal title to start with, framed as a curator's recommendation, not an algorithm
Apply FIRST10 for $10 off the first order to remove purchase friction
Tease the Better Book Club (6 curated books/quarter, member events, LinkedIn group, free shipping) as the natural next step
Set cadence expectations and invite a real reply — a human reads every one

campaigns.name: Author Publishing Lead-Magnet Nurture
campaigns.objective: Move an aspiring-author lead from free webcast viewer toward booking a free consultation and ultimately a publishing package.
campaigns.trigger: Free Publishing Services Webcast registration/view or other gated author asset download.
campaigns.segment: Aspiring-author leads below the sales-ready threshold; branch by book stage (idea vs. manuscript) and by motivation (speaking platform, ministry, business authority).
campaigns.rationale: This is the highest-ticket revenue engine ($1,170–$15,197 packages) and the intake flags it as a clear gap — webcast and consult leads have no nurture path. A buyer-journey-mapped sequence is the proven play to warm long-cycle, high-consideration leads.

emails.purpose: Deliver/recap the webcast value and frame the real problem behind it — the cost of letting your message stay unpublished or settling for DIY.
emails.subject: Your message deserves more than a print button
emails.preview: Why most aspiring authors stall — and the path that keeps you in control.
emails.cta: Book your free consultation with the Acquisitions Team
keyPoints: Reconnect to the webcast and the aspiration: turn your book into a platform, speaking career, and movement
Name the real problem — traditional publishing locks you out; DIY self-publishing costs you rights, royalties, and marketing support
Position Leadership Books as a creative co-pilot: you keep 100% of your rights and get a real launch strategy
Pre-empt the top objection ('why not Amazon KDP?') by reframing cost as control + quality + media reach
Drive to the single highest-intent action: a free, no-pressure consultation with the Acquisitions Team

campaigns.name: Consultation-to-Publishing Conversion
campaigns.objective: Convert a completed free discovery consultation into a signed publishing package.
campaigns.trigger: Free Book Consultation completed with the Acquisitions Team (post-call follow-up).
campaigns.segment: Leads who attended a consultation; branch by package fit discussed (representation listing vs. Bestsellers vs. Premium Publishing) and engagement level.
campaigns.rationale: The consult is this brand's 'trial/demo,' and the intake notes the post-call follow-up sequence is likely missing — exactly where high-ticket deals are won or lost. A timely recap + proposal email is the core revenue conversion step.

emails.purpose: Same-day recap of the call, restate their vision back to them, and present the recommended package path with a clear next step.
emails.subject: Your book, your plan — here's what we mapped out
emails.preview: A recap of our call and the next step to bring your book to life.
keyPoints: Lead by mirroring their stated goal from the call (speaking platform, authority, ministry impact) to show they were heard
Recap the recommended package and what's included — editorial, design, distribution, marketing, media, speakers bureau
Reinforce the differentiators: 100% rights retained, real marketing strategy, creative co-pilot, not a vendor
Handle the cost objection with proof — author outcomes (national media, launched speaking careers) and the value vs. KDP trade-off
Offer a frictionless next step: confirm the package or grab time to finalize the proposal

campaigns.name: Win-Back / Re-Engagement
campaigns.objective: Reactivate lapsed Book Club members and dormant one-off buyers, and clean the list to protect deliverability.
campaigns.trigger: Book Club cancellation, or 60–90 days of no opens/clicks/purchases.
campaigns.segment: Churned Book Club members (reference what they read most) separate from dormant one-off buyers (lead with fresh value).
campaigns.rationale: The intake calls out classic book-subscription churn — members who accumulate unread books cancel — and no win-back exists today. Re-engagement recovers 5–15% of inactive contacts and is quick to ship while protecting sender reputation.

emails.purpose: 'We miss you' — remind them of the core value and surface a personalized reason to come back.
emails.subject: Still reading what top leaders read?
emails.preview: A fresh pick chosen for you — and a reason to come back to the Club.
keyPoints: Acknowledge the gap warmly without guilt — life and the to-read pile got busy
Reconnect to the identity payoff: 'I'm reading what top leaders are reading' and growing every quarter
Surface a personalized recommendation based on their past reading or category (e.g., Christian leadership, business)
Address the unread-pile churn reason head-on — curation means fewer, better books, not more clutter
Make return effortless with one click to the new quarter's selections (or to restart their membership)

campaigns.name: Value Newsletter
campaigns.objective: Stay top-of-mind and build authority across the long cycle, driving Book Club awareness and reader-to-author crossover without discounting.
campaigns.segment: All engaged contacts; suppress active onboarding and route recently-dormant contacts to Win-Back. Branch editions by reader vs. aspiring-author interest.
campaigns.rationale: The intake found no email newsletter cadence despite active YouTube/TikTok content — a missed always-on retention engine. A recurring value send repurposes that content, keeps the brand present between purchases, and seeds both the Book Club and publishing offers.

emails.purpose: Establish the recurring format with one genuinely useful idea — a curated reading pick or leadership insight — and a single soft CTA.
emails.subject: 3 books every leader should read this quarter
emails.preview: Our team's hand-picked shortlist — plus the one most leaders skip.
keyPoints: Anchor on a habit-forming recurring section ('This quarter's leadership shortlist') readers will come to expect
Lead with 80% value — three high-signal picks with a one-line 'why it matters' for each
Repurpose YouTube/TikTok content into a quick read/watch link to extend reach into email
Soft 20% offer — frame the Better Book Club as the easiest way to never miss a pick
Single primary CTA (read the shortlist) with an invitation to reply with what they're reading
